title: Job Vacancies at Betgr8
content:
Betgr8 is a gaming and entertainment platform offering sports betting, casino games, and virtual products across Nigeria and other African markets. In addition to its online services, Betgr8 also operates retail betting shops, giving customers access both digitally and in person. The platform is user-friendly, secure, and designed to deliver a smooth gaming experience for all users.

We are recruiting to fill the following positions below:

1.) Regional Manager - Retail Operations 

Job Location: Nationwide
Employment Type: Full-time
Opening: 10

What You Will Do
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Oversee and manage sports betting retail operations across assigned regions
	Drive betting shop onboarding, activation, and conversion
	Monitor agent and shop performance while implementing growth strategies to increase betting activity and revenue
	Ensure compliance with operational, gaming, and regulatory standards within the sports betting industry
	Execute promotional and customer engagement activities to boost Betgr8 brand visibility and player acquisition
	Provide retail performance insights, betting activity analysis, and operational reports to management.


What We Are Looking For


	Interested candidates should possess an HND / Bachelor`s Degree
	Experience in retail operations, with betting or fintech experience considered a strong advantage.
	Strong leadership ability with proven team management skills.
	A data driven mindset with the ability to analyze and present clear reports.
	Ability to oversee multiple regions while consistently meeting performance targets.
	Strong communication skills and the ability to manage relationships with key stakeholders.


Why Join Betgr8?


	Opportunity to lead nationwide retail expansion
	Dynamic and fast-growing environment
	Competitive salary + performance incentives.


Application Closing Date: 8th June, 2026.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position and Location (State) as the subject of the email.

 

 

2.) Retail Manager

Job Location: Nationwide, Nigeria
Employment Type: Full-time
Slot: 10 Openings

Job Brief


	We are looking to hire a results-driven Retail Manager to oversee and grow Betgr8’s retail operations.
	The role involves managing shop performance, supporting agents, and ensuring a consistent customer experience across all retail locations.
	The ideal candidate should have strong leadership skills, experience in field or retail management, and the ability to track performance and drive growth.
	A good understanding of the sports betting industry and strong communication skills will be an added advantage.


What You Will Do


	Oversee and manage retail operations across assigned regions
	Drive shop onboarding, activation, and conversion
	Monitor agent performance and implement growth strategies
	Ensure compliance with operational and regulatory standards
	Execute promotional activities to boost brand visibility
	Provide performance insights and reports to management.


What We Are Looking For


	Experience in retail operations (betting or fintech is a strong advantage)
	Strong leadership and team management skills
	Data-driven mindset with solid reporting ability
	Ability to manage multiple regions and meet targets
	Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills.


Why Join Betgr8?


	Opportunity to lead nationwide retail expansion
	Dynamic and fast-growing environment
	Competitive salary + performance incentives.


Application Closing Date: 31st May, 2026. 

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position and Location (State) as the subject of the email.

 

 

3.) Retail Officer

Job Location: Nigeria(Nationwide)
Employment Type: Full-time
Position: 10
Salary: Competitve + Performance Incentive

What WeAre Looking For


	Experience in retail operations (betting or fintech is a strong advantage)
	Strong leadership and team management skills
	Data-driven mindset with solid reporting ability
	Ability to manage multiple regions and meet targets
	Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills.


What YouWill Do


	Oversee and manage retail operations across assigned regions
	Drive shop onboarding, activation, and conversion
	Monitor agent performance and implement growth strategies
	Ensure compliance with operational and regulatory standards
	Execute promotional activities to boost brand visibility
	Provide performance insights and reports to management.


Why Join Betgr8?


	Opportunity to lead nationwide retail expansion
	Dynamic and fast-growing environment
	
		Competitive salary + performance incentives.
	
	


Application Closing Date: 31st May, 2026.

Method of Application 
Interested candidates should send their CV to:[email protected]using the Job Position and Location (State) as the subject of the mail.

     

    

        Click here to Apply

Logistics Officer (Driver) Job at Popville Luxury Homes




        
    

        
        Popville Luxury Homes is a fully integrated real estate development and management company headquartered in Abuja, delivering a new standard of intelligent luxury living. We create architecturally refined residences where advanced smart technology, timeless design, and uncompromising security converge. Inspired by the power, grace, and individuality of the world’s most iconic horse breeds, our collections represent freedom, sophistication, and enduring value. Each Popville residence is thoughtfully engineered to enhance comfort, efficiency, and long-term investment performance. At Popville, we don’t simply build homes—we develop future-ready assets designed for discerning homeowners and forward-thinking investors.
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Logistics Officer (Driver)

Job Location: Wuse 2, Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Full-time

Description


	If You are a skilled driver who has experience driving professionall in Abuja, Apply below!


Salary
N100,000 - N120,000 monthly.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Application to: [email protected] using "Application for the role of a Driver" as the subject of the email.

  "title": "Hotel Manager",
  "description": "Crown Bee Luxury Apartment is recruiting suitable candidates to fill the position below:

Job Position: Hotel Manager
Job Location: Lugbe, Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are seeking to hire a competent and experienced Hotel Manager to oversee the daily operations of our luxury and serviced apartment facility in Lugbe, Abuja.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for managing the day-to-day operations of the apartment facility, ensuring excellent guest experience, supervising staff, maintaining operational standards, and driving business growth.
	The candidate must have solid experience in the hospitality industry and possess strong leadership and organizational skills.


Key Responsibilities


	Oversee the daily operations of the luxury and serviced apartment facility.
	Ensure excellent customer service and guest satisfaction at all times.
	Supervise and coordinate staff activities, schedules, and performance.
	Manage bookings, reservations, and guest relations.
	Ensure cleanliness, maintenance, and proper functioning of all facilities.
	Monitor inventory, supplies, and procurement needs.
	Prepare operational reports and maintain accurate records.
	Implement strategies to improve occupancy and revenue generation.
	Ensure compliance with hospitality standards, health, and safety regulations.
	Handle customer complaints and resolve issues professionally.


Requirements


	Minimum of 3 years&rsquo; experience in hotel management or hospitality operations.
	Proven experience managing hotels, apartments, or hospitality facilities.
	Strong leadership, communication, and customer service skills.
	Good knowledge of hotel management procedures and operations.
	Ability to work independently and manage teams effectively.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office and hotel booking/management systems is an added advantage.
	Candidate must reside within the Lugbe axis or nearby areas.


Salary
N100,000 - N200,000 per month.&nbsp;

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: crownbeeluxury@gmail.com with &quot;Application for Hotel Manager&quot; as the subject of the mail.&nbsp;",

Hotel Manager Job at Crown Bee Luxury Apartment




        
    

        
        Crown Bee Luxury Apartment is recruiting suitable candidates to fill the position below:

Job Position: Hotel Manager
Job Location: Lugbe, Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are seeking to hire a competent and experienced Hotel Manager to oversee the daily operations of our luxury and serviced apartment facility in Lugbe, Abuja.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for managing the day-to-day operations of the apartment facility, ensuring excellent guest experience, supervising staff, maintaining operational standards, and driving business growth.
	The candidate must have solid experience in the hospitality industry and possess strong leadership and organizational skills.


Key Responsibilities


	Oversee the daily operations of the luxury and serviced apartment facility.
	Ensure excellent customer service and guest satisfaction at all times.
	Supervise and coordinate staff activities, schedules, and performance.
	Manage bookings, reservations, and guest relations.
	Ensure cleanliness, maintenance, and proper functioning of all facilities.
	Monitor inventory, supplies, and procurement needs.
	Prepare operational reports and maintain accurate records.
	Implement strategies to improve occupancy and revenue generation.
	Ensure compliance with hospitality standards, health, and safety regulations.
	Handle customer complaints and resolve issues professionally.


Requirements


	Minimum of 3 years’ experience in hotel management or hospitality operations.
	Proven experience managing hotels, apartments, or hospitality facilities.
	Strong leadership, communication, and customer service skills.
	Good knowledge of hotel management procedures and operations.
	Ability to work independently and manage teams effectively.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office and hotel booking/management systems is an added advantage.
	Candidate must reside within the Lugbe axis or nearby areas.


Salary
N100,000 - N200,000 per month. 

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] with "Application for Hotel Manager" as the subject of the mail.

  "title": "Video Editor",
  "description": "Sage Grey Technologies Limited is a venture studio which engages in development, production, and distribution of technology related products, services or solutions.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Video Editor

Job Location: Isolo, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Summary


	The Video Editor will be a key member of the Marketing &amp; Growth team, responsible for conceptualizing, editing, and optimizing video assets across all company channels including social media, website, YouTube, paid advertising, events, and internal communications.


Responsibilities


	Edit and produce high-quality short-form and long-form videos from raw footage.
	Create trending, platform-optimized content (Instagram Reels, TikTok, YouTube Shorts, LinkedIn, etc.).
	Apply motion graphics, animations, text overlays, transitions, color grading, and sound design.
	Add subtitles/captions in English and any required local languages.
	Ensure 100% adherence to brand guidelines and visual identity.
	Optimize videos for different platforms (aspect ratio, length, resolution, file size).
	Work closely with Digital Marketing Officer, social media/Community Manager, and Graphic Designers on campaign deliverables.
	Shoot occasional simple videos or BTS footage when required.
	Maintain organized project files and asset library.
	Stay updated with video trends, editing techniques, and platform best practices.
	Support live events and real-time video editing when needed.


Deliverables


	Weekly content as scheduled in the marketing calendar.
	Campaign videos, product explainers, testimonials, ads, and event highlights.
	Multiple versions of videos for different platforms.
	Proper archiving and handover of all project files.


Qualifications


	Interested candidates should possess a Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree with 2 - 3 years of experience.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: careers@sagegreytech.com using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

Video Editor Job at Sage Grey Technologies Limited




        
    

        
        Sage Grey Technologies Limited is a venture studio which engages in development, production, and distribution of technology related products, services or solutions.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Video Editor

Job Location: Isolo, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Summary


	The Video Editor will be a key member of the Marketing & Growth team, responsible for conceptualizing, editing, and optimizing video assets across all company channels including social media, website, YouTube, paid advertising, events, and internal communications.


Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Edit and produce high-quality short-form and long-form videos from raw footage.
	Create trending, platform-optimized content (Instagram Reels, TikTok, YouTube Shorts, LinkedIn, etc.).
	Apply motion graphics, animations, text overlays, transitions, color grading, and sound design.
	Add subtitles/captions in English and any required local languages.
	Ensure 100% adherence to brand guidelines and visual identity.
	Optimize videos for different platforms (aspect ratio, length, resolution, file size).
	Work closely with Digital Marketing Officer, social media/Community Manager, and Graphic Designers on campaign deliverables.
	Shoot occasional simple videos or BTS footage when required.
	Maintain organized project files and asset library.
	Stay updated with video trends, editing techniques, and platform best practices.
	Support live events and real-time video editing when needed.


Deliverables


	Weekly content as scheduled in the marketing calendar.
	Campaign videos, product explainers, testimonials, ads, and event highlights.
	Multiple versions of videos for different platforms.
	Proper archiving and handover of all project files.


Qualifications


	Interested candidates should possess a Bachelor’s Degree with 2 - 3 years of experience.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Executive Assistant to the MD",
  "description": "Worknigeria was established with a Singular Vision. To help the vast Nigerian workforce find meaningful jobs. We are also on a mission to upskill them in the best ways possible and help them grow with and within their careers.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Executive Assistant to the MD&nbsp;

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Sector: Geotechnical / Geoenvironmental Construction

Description


	Managing the CEO&#39;s calendar and recurring tasks, appointments, travel arrangements and prioritizing the most sensitive matters
	Manage emails, information, and other communications; answer where possible, highlight and prioritize those that need MD / CEO attention.
	Screening and handling phone calls and sending reminders to the MD on pending and overdue tasks.
	Preparing and reviewing documents, memos, agendas, and reports for the CEO.
	Coordinating and recording meetings, conference calls, and interviews
	Organize, prepare, coordinate, set agendas for and record meetings, conference calls and interview, including gathering documents and attending to the logistics of meetings.
	Act as &lsquo;follow-up Manager&rsquo; to ensure that a wide range of agreed actions are being executed.
	Type up notes, emails, presentations, and reports; circulate and file information.
	Maintain strict confidentiality with sensitive information, and MD/CEO personal matters.
	Provide &ldquo;Gatekeeper and Gateway&rdquo; role, creating win-win situations for direct access to MD/CEO&rsquo;s time and Office.
	Other duties as may be assigned by the CEO.


Qualifications


	Minimum of a Bachelor&#39;s Degree in related field. A Degree in Geology would be a plus.
	Minimum of 3 years of experience in Administrative Assistance tasks to support organizational needs.
	Female for gender balance.
	Prior experience in a similar role is a plus.
	Strong skills in Executive Administrative Assistance and Executive Support.
	Excellent organizational and time management skills.
	Exceptional written and verbal communication abilities.
	Ability to maintain confidentiality and exercise discretion.
	Proficiency in common office software and tools (e.g., Microsoft Office Suite).


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: careers@worknigeria.com using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

Executive Assistant to the MD Job at Worknigeria




        
    

        
        Worknigeria was established with a Singular Vision. To help the vast Nigerian workforce find meaningful jobs. We are also on a mission to upskill them in the best ways possible and help them grow with and within their careers.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Executive Assistant to the MD 

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Sector: Geotechnical / Geoenvironmental Construction

Description
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Managing the CEO's calendar and recurring tasks, appointments, travel arrangements and prioritizing the most sensitive matters
	Manage emails, information, and other communications; answer where possible, highlight and prioritize those that need MD / CEO attention.
	Screening and handling phone calls and sending reminders to the MD on pending and overdue tasks.
	Preparing and reviewing documents, memos, agendas, and reports for the CEO.
	Coordinating and recording meetings, conference calls, and interviews
	Organize, prepare, coordinate, set agendas for and record meetings, conference calls and interview, including gathering documents and attending to the logistics of meetings.
	Act as ‘follow-up Manager’ to ensure that a wide range of agreed actions are being executed.
	Type up notes, emails, presentations, and reports; circulate and file information.
	Maintain strict confidentiality with sensitive information, and MD/CEO personal matters.
	Provide “Gatekeeper and Gateway” role, creating win-win situations for direct access to MD/CEO’s time and Office.
	Other duties as may be assigned by the CEO.


Qualifications


	Minimum of a Bachelor's Degree in related field. A Degree in Geology would be a plus.
	Minimum of 3 years of experience in Administrative Assistance tasks to support organizational needs.
	Female for gender balance.
	Prior experience in a similar role is a plus.
	Strong skills in Executive Administrative Assistance and Executive Support.
	Excellent organizational and time management skills.
	Exceptional written and verbal communication abilities.
	Ability to maintain confidentiality and exercise discretion.
	Proficiency in common office software and tools (e.g., Microsoft Office Suite).


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply
